title: polygala franchetii
intro: Polygala franchetii, also known as Yuzuru or Franchet's Polygala, is a traditional Chinese medicinal plant belonging to the family Polygalaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to regulate immune function and improve cardiovascular health. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving symptoms of conditions such as rheumatism, bronchitis, and fever, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and triglyceride levels. In traditional Chinese medicine, Polygala franchetii is often prepared as a decoction or made into a tea, with the dried root and rhizome being used in herbal preparations to treat various ailments.
